summary: The session focused on how to start and set up a web design company, including essential steps such as developing a business plan, defining services, and establishing pricing strategies. The user sought guidance on pricing web design projects specifically for large companies, emphasizing the importance of project scope and industry standards.
facts: The user is interested in starting a web design company. The user is seeking advice on how to set up a web design company. The user inquired about pricing strategies for web design projects aimed at large companies. The user was provided with steps to develop a business plan, define services, and establish a pricing strategy for their web design company. The user was advised to create a portfolio to showcase their work and attract clients. The user was informed about the importance of understanding project scope and industry pricing standards when pricing for large companies.
